summary.para: Floating point number used to decrease or increase the relevance scores of the query. Boost values are relative to the default value of 1.0. A boost value between 0 and 1.0 decreases the relevance score. A value greater than 1.0 increases the relevance score.

Filter query you wish to run. Any returned documents must match this query. Filter queries do not calculate relevance scores. To speed up performance, Elasticsearch automatically caches frequently used filter queries.
